name: ieee
description: IEEE standard house style. Headings are dotted-numeric (e.g. '9.3.2 Title'). Cross-refs use the section-sign form '§9.3.2', optionally prefixed by a document designator ('IEEE 802.11-2020 §9.3.2' — the designator is captured and resolved against other files' doc_id front matter in a corpus-wide second pass; same-file refs with no designator resolve as before), plus 'Clause 9.3.2' / 'subclause 9.3.2'.
